rulings.Case Title: PAUL J. GARIBOLDI VS. QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 13, 2010, line 10, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE Re Preliminary Injunction. DENIED, PLAINTIFF IS UNLIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. TENDER IS REQUIRED. SEE U.S. COLD STORAGE V. GREAT WESTERN SAVINGS & LOAN ASSOCIATION, (1985) 165 CAL.APP.3D 1214. A TECHNICAL DEFECT IN THE SALE PROCEDURE WILL NOT INVALIDATE THE SALE UNLESS THE BORROWER SUFFERED PREJUDICE WHICH IS NOT SHOWN HERE. SEE KNAPP V. DOHERTY (2004) 123 CAL.APP.4TH 76. CC SECTION 2924 ET. SEQ. IS A COMPREHENSIVE SCHEME REGARDING FORECLOSURE. CC SECTION 2924(a)(1) PROVIDING THAT THE TRUSTEE, MORTGAGEE OR BENEFICIARY OR ANY OF THEIR AUTHORIZED AGENTS CAN SEEK FORECLOSURE DOES NOT REQUIRE THAT THE NOTE BE PRODUCED. =(302/CWW)
